name: Oil-and-Vinegar (UOV) signature scheme
task: Create /tmp/eval_uov/uov.py implementing the (unbalanced) Oil-and-Vinegar multivariate-quadratic signature scheme over GF(p) with p = 251. Required: P = 251 (module constant); uov_keygen(v, o, seed=0, p=P) — generate the central map F (a list of o quadratic polynomials over v vinegar + o oil variables, each polynomial has only vinegar*vinegar and vinegar*oil terms — NO oil*oil), pick a random invertible (v+o)x(v+o) linear transform T mod p, return (public_polys, private_key) where public_polys = F composed with T expanded into monomials {(i, j) -> coeff} with i <= j. uov_sign(message_hash, private_key, seed=0, p=P) — message_hash is a list of o integers mod p; pick random vinegar values; with vinegar fixed the central map is linear in oil — solve via Gaussian elimination over GF(p); apply T_inv to recover the signature. Retry with new vinegar if linear system is singular. Returns a list of v+o integers. uov_verify(message_hash, signature, public_key, p=P) — evaluate public_polys on signature and check = message_hash mod p.

validation.script:
import importlib.util,random; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_uov/uov.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); P = mod.P; assert P == 251
# INDEPENDENT verifier: evaluate the public quadratic map from its own coefficient dicts.
# Contract (from spec): public_polys is a list of o dicts {(i,j): coeff} with i<=j; poly(x) = sum coeff * x[i] * x[j] mod P.
def pub_eval(poly, x):
    return sum(c * x[i] * x[j] for (i, j), c in dict(poly).items()) % P
def verify(h, sig, pub):
    sig = [s % P for s in sig]
    return len(pub) == len(h) and all(pub_eval(pub[r], sig) == h[r] % P for r in range(len(h)))
pub, priv = mod.uov_keygen(v=8, o=4, seed=42)
assert len(pub) == 4, f'expected 4 public polynomials, got {len(pub)}'
for poly in pub:
    for (i, j) in dict(poly).keys(): assert 0 <= i <= j < 12, f'monomial index out of range or not i<=j: {(i,j)}'
h = [10, 20, 30, 40]; sig = mod.uov_sign(h, priv, seed=1); assert len(sig) == 12, f'signature length {len(sig)} != v+o'
assert verify(h, sig, pub), 'legitimate signature does not satisfy the public map — sign/keygen inconsistent'
bad = list(sig); bad[0] = (bad[0] + 1) % P; assert not verify(h, bad, pub), 'tampered signature accepted'
_r = random.Random(99); rsig = [_r.randrange(P) for _ in sig]; assert not verify(h, rsig, pub), 'random signature accepted'
h2 = [50, 60, 70, 80]; sig2 = mod.uov_sign(h2, priv, seed=2); assert verify(h2, sig2, pub), 'second signature invalid'
assert not verify(h, sig2, pub), 'signature for h2 wrongly satisfies h'
# a second independent keypair — signatures must not cross-verify
pub_b, priv_b = mod.uov_keygen(v=8, o=4, seed=7); sig_b = mod.uov_sign(h, priv_b, seed=3)
assert verify(h, sig_b, pub_b) and not verify(h, sig_b, pub), 'keys not independent'
print('OK')
